#  Apache Flink 1.7.0 Release Announcement
November 30, 2018 - Till Rohrmann (@stsffap)
The Apache Flink community is pleased to announce Apache Flink 1.7.0. The latest release includes more than 420 resolved issues and some exciting additi…
